headline: RSG Q1 Deep Dive: Pricing, Digital Investments, and M&A Offset Flat Volumes
summary: Waste management company Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 2.6% year on year to $4.11 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.70 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks That Fall Short
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Top waste companies spent nearly $700M on M&A in Q1 2026
summary: Notable transactions included GFL’s deal to acquire Frontier Waste, along with Casella’s acquisition of Mountain State Waste.
